info.title: Warehouse Facility Operations Service API
info.description: REST API for warehouse facility operations including racks, locations, docks, equipment, and work orders

tags.name: RF Sync
tags.description: RF Mobile Sync and Offline Support APIs

tags.name: Health Check
tags.description: APIs for checking the health status of the service

get.summary: Get all warehouse events
Get all warehouse equipments

post.description: Returns optimal storage locations based on putaway rules, product velocity, client segregation, shelf-life, weight, zone requirements, capacity availability, and distance optimization. Uses enhanced rule-based algorithm.

get.summary: Get all storage locations

post.description: Creates multiple storage locations based on aisle/rack/level/bin structure. Location codes are generated in format: {aisle}-{rack:02d}-{level:02d}-{bin:02d}
Uploads all transactions completed while device was offline. Server validates and processes transactions, handling conflicts and duplicates.
Verifies all cartons are loaded, weights verified, and seals applied
Verifies carton on manifest, checks if already shipped, prevents duplicates. Returns carton details and shipment progress.
Moves carton to staging lane and updates load manifest
Calls carrier API for rate/label (FedEx, UPS, USPS), generates all labels atomically. Stores tracking numbers, calculates cost, returns manifest requirement.
Confirms all items loaded, generates BOL, prepares for dispatch
Validates location, item, lot, or LPN barcodes against task expectations. Provides context-aware error messages.
Validates First-Expired-First-Out rules for lot-controlled replenishment. Blocks if earlier expiry exists, warns if approaching expiry threshold.
Validates FEFO compliance and returns enriched alternative lot details with locations
Completes task, updates inventory, and suggests next nearest task. Creates inventory transactions (debit/credit), checks reorder points.

post.summary: Validate location scan with capacity check
post.description: Validates location and checks capacity constraints for putaway

post.summary: Validate location barcode scan before putaway confirmation
Complete putaway task with location confirmation

post.description: Validates item belongs to order, checks quantity, suggests carton type. Returns enriched product details and compatibility warnings.
Manhattan WMS aligned: Ends packing session, releases station resource, returns session statistics (orders/cartons completed).

post.summary: Assign packing station to RF operator
post.description: Manhattan WMS aligned: Operator scans station barcode to claim station. Creates session with STATION_ASSIGNED status. Station marked unavailable.
Creates a new packing session for the RF operator and assigns initial orders to pack
Packs multiple items atomically. Calculates weight, utilization, detects full cartons. Rolls back if any item fails validation.

post.summary: Generate internal packing label for carton
post.description: Manhattan WMS aligned: Generates ZPL barcode label for internal carton tracking. Different from shipping labels which have carrier tracking numbers.
Finalizes carton weight, generates shipping label (ZPL/PDF), checks if order complete, suggests next carton size.
Manhattan WMS aligned: Scans empty carton barcode, creates parent LPN, links to order. Returns carton ready for item packing.

post.description: Marks putaway task as completed and creates inventory transaction. Updates inventory balance at destination location.

post.summary: Auto-generate putaway tasks from goods receipt

post.description: Creates putaway tasks for all received items in a completed Goods Receipt. This endpoint is typically called by the workflow automation when GRN status changes to COMPLETED. Returns the count of tasks created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the work order

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this work order belongs to

workOrderNumber.description: Unique number identifier for the work order

workOrderName.description: Human-readable name for the work order

description.description: Detailed description of the work order
description.example: Assemble 100 units of Product X with special packaging requirements

productId.description: ID of the product being produced or worked on

productName.description: Name of the product being produced

productCode.description: Code of the product being produced

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure for quantities

status.description: Current status of the work order

priority.description: Priority level of the work order (lower number = higher priority)

assignedToUserId.description: ID of the user assigned to this work order

assignedAt.description: Timestamp when the work order was assigned

startedAt.description: Timestamp when work on the order began

actualDurationHours.description: Actual duration in hours spent on the work order

createdDate.description: Date when the work order was created

releasedDate.description: Date when the work order was released for execution

scheduledStartDate.description: Scheduled start date for the work order

scheduledEndDate.description: Scheduled end date for the work order

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the work order was completed

sourceType.description: Type of source that created this work order

sourceReferenceId.description: Reference ID from the source system

notes.description: Additional notes about the work order
notes.example: Requires special tools and safety equipment

WorkOrder.description: Work order entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the warehouse event

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

description.example: Inventory count completed for aisle A

affectedUserId.description: ID of the user affected by the event

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the event was resolved

resolvedByUserId.description: ID of the user who resolved the event

id.description: Unique identifier for the warehouse equipment

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

purchaseDate.description: Date when the equipment was purchased

assignedUserId.description: ID of the user assigned to the equipment

id.description: Unique identifier for the storage location

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this location belongs to

clientId.description: Client/customer ID for client-based segregation (null = shared location)

zoneId.description: ID of the warehouse zone this location belongs to

rackRowId.description: ID of the rack row this location belongs to (denormalized for query performance)

bayId.description: ID of the bay this location belongs to

levelId.description: ID of the rack level this location belongs to

bayNumber.description: Bay number within the rack level

locationName.description: Human-readable name of the storage location

locationCode.description: Unique code identifier for the storage location

description.description: Detailed description of the storage location
description.example: Standard pallet location with easy access

length.description: Length of the storage location in meters

width.description: Width of the storage location in meters

height.description: Height of the storage location in meters

maxWeight.description: Maximum weight capacity of the location in kg

maxVolume.description: Maximum volume capacity of the location in cubic meters

allowedProductCategoriesJson.description: JSON array of allowed product categories for this location

allowedProductAttributesJson.description: JSON object of allowed product attributes

allowedStorageConditionsJson.description: JSON object of allowed storage conditions

isActive.description: Whether this storage location is currently active

isBlocked.description: Whether this storage location is currently blocked

isReserved.description: Whether this storage location is currently reserved

blockReason.description: Reason why the location is blocked

pickSequenceNumber.description: Sequence number for pick path optimization

travelDistanceFromDock.description: Distance from dock in meters for routing optimization

lastPickedAt.description: Timestamp when this location was last picked from

qrCodeData.description: QR code data for mobile scanning

labelPrintedAt.description: Timestamp when location label was last printed

StorageLocation.description: Storage location entity representing individual storage positions

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this task

id.description: Unique identifier for the replenishment task

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

taskName.example: Replenish Product A to Pick Location

description.example: Move 50 units from bulk to pick face

productId.description: ID of the product to replenish

ruleId.description: Rule that generated this task (if auto-generated)

ReplenishmentTask.description: Replenishment task entity representing work orders to move inventory

updatedBy.description: User who last updated this rule

id.description: Unique identifier for the replenishment rule

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

ReplenishmentRule.description: Replenishment rule entity defining min/max levels for automatic inventory replenishment

aisleId.description: ID of the aisle this rack row belongs to

rackRowName.description: Human-readable name of the rack row

rackRowCode.description: Unique code identifier for the rack row

description.description: Detailed description of the rack row
description.example: Heavy-duty rack row for pallet storage

length.description: Length of the rack row in meters (horizontal dimension along aisle)

width.description: Width of the rack row in meters (depth from aisle)

height.description: Height of the rack row in meters (vertical dimension)

totalLevels.description: Total number of vertical levels (shelf heights) in the bays

totalBays.description: Total number of bays (vertical upright sections) in this rack row

totalCapacity.description: Total volume capacity of the rack row in cubic meters

weightCapacityPerLevel.description: Maximum weight capacity per level in kg

isActive.description: Whether this rack row is currently active

qrCodeData.description: QR code data for mobile scanning

CreateRackRowRequestDto.description: Request DTO for creating a new rack row

id.description: Unique identifier for the rack level

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this rack level belongs to

bayId.description: ID of the bay this level belongs to

levelNumber.description: Sequential number of this level within the bay (1=bottom, higher numbers=higher shelves)

levelName.description: Human-readable name for the rack level

description.description: Detailed description of the rack level
description.example: Third level shelf with reinforced support

height.description: Height of the rack level in meters

width.description: Width of the rack level in meters

depth.description: Depth of the rack level in meters

weightCapacity.description: Maximum weight capacity of the rack level in kg

volumeCapacity.description: Maximum volume capacity of the rack level in cubic meters

isActive.description: Whether this rack level is currently active

RackLevel.description: Level entity representing horizontal shelves within bays

id.description: Unique identifier for the putaway task

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

description.description: Detailed description of the putaway task
description.example: Move 50 laptops from receiving dock to rack A1

receiptLineId.description: ID of the related goods receipt line

receiptItemId.description: ID of the related receipt item

grnNumber.description: Goods Receipt Number that generated this putaway task

lpnBarcode.description: LPN barcode for the item to be put away (RF workflow)

actualLocationBarcode.description: Actual location barcode where item was placed (RF scan)

overrideReasonCode.description: Reason code if actual location differs from suggested

productId.description: ID of the product to be put away

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure

assignedToUserId.description: ID of the user assigned to the task

status.description: Current status of the putaway task

priority.description: Priority level of the task (lower number = higher priority)

createdDate.description: Date when the task was created

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was completed

id.description: Unique identifier for the putaway rule

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this rule belongs to

clientId.description: Client/customer ID for client-based segregation (null = applies to all clients)

productId.description: Product ID for SKU-specific rules (null = applies to all products)

productCategoryId.description: Product category ID this rule applies to (null = all categories)

destinationZoneId.description: Destination zone ID for this rule (null = any zone)

locationTypePreference.description: Preferred location type for this rule

ruleName.description: Human-readable name of the putaway rule

ruleCode.description: Unique code identifier for the putaway rule

description.description: Detailed description of the putaway rule
description.example: Store high-value electronics in secure, climate-controlled locations

priority.description: Priority of the rule (lower number = higher priority)

productCategoryIdsJson.description: JSON array of product category IDs this rule applies to

productAttributeRulesJson.description: JSON object defining product attribute rules

productUomIdsJson.description: JSON array of product UOM IDs this rule applies to

storageConditionRequirementsJson.description: JSON object defining required storage conditions

destinationZoneIdsJson.description: JSON array of destination zone IDs for this rule

destinationLocationTypesJson.description: JSON array of allowed destination location types

destinationLocationAttributesJson.description: JSON object defining destination location attributes

actionType.description: Type of action this rule performs

fixedLocationCode.description: Fixed location code for direct assignment rules

isActive.description: Whether this putaway rule is currently active

velocityClassFilter.description: Allowed velocity classes for this rule (comma-separated: A,B,C)

minPickFrequencyPerDay.description: Minimum pick frequency per day for high-velocity slotting

preferPickFaceForFastMovers.description: Whether to prefer pick face locations for fast-moving items

PutawayRule.description: Putaway rule entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the packing slip

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this packing slip belongs to

packingSlipNumber.description: Unique number identifier for the packing slip

packingSlipName.description: Human-readable name for the packing slip

description.description: Detailed description of the packing slip
description.example: Packing slip for customer order containing electronics

shipmentId.description: ID of the associated outbound shipment

status.description: Current status of the packing slip

createdDate.description: Date when the packing slip was created

packedDate.description: Date when the packing was completed

packedByUserId.description: ID of the user who performed the packing

weight.description: Total weight of the packed items in kg

volume.description: Total volume of the packed items in cubic meters

notes.description: Additional notes about the packing slip

PackingSlip.description: Packing slip entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the packing slip item

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this item belongs to

packingSlipId.description: ID of the packing slip this item belongs to

pickingTaskId.description: ID of the picking task that sourced this item

productId.description: ID of the product being packed

quantityPacked.description: Quantity of the product that was packed

uomId.description: ID of the unit of measure for the quantity

lotNumber.description: Lot number of the product batch

serialNumbersJson.description: JSON array of serial numbers for tracked items

containerId.description: ID of the container this item is packed in

notes.description: Additional notes about this packing slip item

PackingSlipItem.description: Packing slip item entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the packing station

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this packing station belongs to

stationName.description: Human-readable name of the packing station

stationCode.description: Unique code identifier for the packing station

description.description: Detailed description of the packing station
description.example: Main packing station with integrated scale and printer

locationId.description: ID of the storage location associated with this station

printerType.description: Type of printer connected to this station

scaleType.description: Type of scale equipment at this station

scannerType.description: Type of barcode scanner at this station

isActive.description: Whether this packing station is currently active

isAvailable.description: Whether this packing station is currently available for use

PackingStation.description: Packing station entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the hazmat material

facilityId.description: Facility ID this hazmat material belongs to

HazmatMaterial.description: Hazardous material entity with storage and handling requirements

tenantId.description: ID of the tenant this access control belongs to

accessId.description: Unique identifier for the access control entry

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this access control applies to

userId.description: ID of the user this access control is for

roleInFacility.description: Role of the user within the facility

permissionsJson.description: JSON object defining specific permissions within the facility

isActive.description: Whether this access control entry is currently active

FacilityAccessControl.description: Facility access control entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the escalation rule

facilityId.description: Facility ID (null means applies to all facilities)

exceptionType.description: Exception type this rule applies to

timeThresholdMinutes.description: Time threshold in minutes before escalation

notifyUsers.description: Specific users to notify (JSON array of UUIDs)

id.description: Unique identifier for the equipment maintenance record

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this maintenance belongs to

equipmentId.description: ID of the equipment that was maintained

scheduledDate.description: Date when the maintenance was scheduled

maintenanceDate.description: Date when the maintenance was actually performed

nextMaintenanceDate.description: Date when the next maintenance is due

performedByUserId.description: ID of the user who performed the maintenance

technicianName.description: Name of the technician who performed the maintenance

description.description: Detailed description of the maintenance work performed
description.example: Replaced conveyor belt and lubricated bearings

durationMinutes.description: Duration of the maintenance work in minutes

status.description: Current status of the maintenance record

EquipmentMaintenance.description: Equipment maintenance entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the cross-dock operation

facilityId.description: ID of the warehouse facility

productId.description: ID of the product being cross-docked

status.description: Current status of the cross-dock operation

CrossDockOperation.description: Cross-dock operation entity for direct inbound-to-outbound transfers

id.description: Unique identifier for the compliance requirement

facilityId.description: Facility ID (null means applies to all facilities)

id.description: Unique identifier for the audit

facilityId.description: Facility ID

ComplianceAudit.description: Compliance audit entity for audit trail

id.description: Unique identifier for the carrier

carrierCode.description: Unique code identifier for the carrier

description.example: International shipping carrier with worldwide delivery

contactName.description: Contact person name for the carrier

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for the carrier

apiEndpointUrl.description: API endpoint URL for carrier integration

isActive.description: Whether this carrier is currently active

id.description: Unique identifier for the labor time log

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this time log belongs to

assignmentId.description: ID of the labor shift assignment this log belongs to

userId.description: ID of the user this time log is for

dateWorked.description: Date when the work was performed

clockInTime.description: Timestamp when the user clocked in

clockOutTime.description: Timestamp when the user clocked out

totalScheduledMinutes.description: Total scheduled minutes for the shift

netWorkedMinutes.description: Net worked minutes (total worked minus breaks)

status.description: Current status of the time log

notes.description: Additional notes about the time log

LaborTimeLog.description: Labor time log entity for warehouse management

id.description: Unique identifier for the shift assignment

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this assignment belongs to

shiftId.description: ID of the shift being assigned

userId.description: ID of the user assigned to this shift

status.description: Current status of the shift assignment

notes.description: Additional notes about the shift assignment

LaborShiftAssignment.description: Labor shift assignment entity for warehouse management

LocalTime.description: Scheduled end time for the shift

id.description: Unique identifier for the labor performance metric

facilityId.description: ID of the facility this metric belongs to

userId.description: ID of the user this performance metric is for

dateCalculated.description: Date when this performance metric was calculated

totalTasksCompleted.description: Total number of tasks completed by the user

totalQuantityProcessed.description: Total quantity of items processed by the user

totalStandardMinutesRequired.description: Total standard minutes required for the tasks

totalNetMinutesWorked.description: Total net minutes actually worked by the user

efficiencyPercentage.description: Efficiency percentage achieved by the user

LaborPerformanceMetric.description: Labor performance metric entity for warehouse management

items.description: List of successfully created location codes

errors.description: List of error messages for failed creations

items.description: List of error messages for failed creations
items.example: ["Failed to create A01-05-03-08: Duplicate location code"]
